name: artemisia absinthium
title: artemisia absinthium benefits
description: Artemisia absinthium relieves menstrual cramps, which refer to the intense pain and discomfort experienced by some women during their menstrual cycle due to uterine contractions. This benefit is important because menstrual cramps can significantly impact daily life, causing missed work or school, decreased productivity, and decreased quality of life, as seen in cases where women have to rely on over-the-counter pain medications or miss important social events.
